The '''Northern Lakes''' was a region that was located in the northern latitudes on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. Situated north of the territories of [[Frenzied River]] and [[Singing Mountain (Dathomir)/Legends|Singing Mountain]], it was home to several small [[lake]]s.
